summary: Strategic analytics leader adept at solving complex business challenges across the full data science lifecycle, from data architecture to advanced modeling, to deliver actionable, data-driven strategies. Proven track record of synthesizing insights into compelling recommendations, persuasively communicating them to senior executives, and driving implementation to impact critical initiatives, particularly within highly regulated environments like Policy, Risk, and Compliance.

highlights: Developed a scalable Python automation framework to modernize complex inventory audit workflows; eliminated manual data disparities and reduced reporting latency by 80%, ensuring the high-fidelity data integrity required to secure consecutive unmodified audit opinions for the USMC.
Supported a cost-benefit analysis to determine strategic approach for the USMC to acquire a $1B capability.

Engineered a readiness platform for 17K+ global assets; leveraged SQL-based methodology and interactive visualization to conduct spatiotemporal root-cause analysis on downtime trends, resulting in an accelerated, proactive diagnostic framework that reduced time to discovery by over 10 days.

Spearheaded data architecture for a Coast Guard Data Warehouse and automated Python/SQL ETL pipelines to unify disparate silos into a single source of truth; engineered predictive maintenance models and self-service BI suites that transitioned leadership from reactive reporting to proactive, data-driven asset management.

Directed an enterprise-wide Business Intelligence suite for 500+ stakeholders, centralizing disparate financial streams into a unified Power BI ecosystem; automated 60% of manual reporting tasks, reducing report generation time from hours to seconds and accelerating the fiscal decision-making cycle.

Modernized enterprise-scale financial forecasting by architecting automated Databricks ETL pipelines; consolidated disparate, legacy transactional streams into a unified Data Lakehouse, achieving a 12% increase in forecasting accuracy through the deployment of advanced time-series ensemble models.

skills.label: Data Science & Advanced Analytics
skills.details: Python, R, Machine Learning, Predictive Modeling, Statistical Analysis, Causal Inference, Operations Research, Generative AI

skills.label: Data Engineering & Business Intelligence
skills.details: SQL, ETL, Databricks, Azure, Spark, BigQuery, Data Engineering, Power BI, Tableau, Power Query, Power Automate, Power Apps
